data.name: Ardent Passions
data.detailed_description: 熱情的故事概述 Big Chungus Productions 邀請您進入一款身臨其境的敘事成人視覺小說遊戲，其中英雄主義與邪惡之間的界限變得模糊。飾演世界知名的超級英雄希羅曼，逃離喧囂的城市生活，與你的新歡和她看似無害的好朋友一起踏上鄉村露營之旅。當荒野的寧靜被令人毛骨悚然的啟示所打破時，面對意想不到的挑戰和決策，這將決定你的人際關係和命運的進程。在野外的中心地帶，秘密逐漸曝光，希羅曼在揭露同伴們的秘密治安活動時，粉碎了他們對同伴的看法。在整個遊戲過程中，體驗扣人心弦的敘事以及塑造結果的有意義的選擇。你會阻止你的愛人和她的朋友走上可疑的道路，還是在一場激動人心的理想之戰中與他們對峙？這次不只是為了拯救世界，更是為了定義英雄的意義。這些義務警員是成為盟友還是敵人取決於你。踏上《熱情激情》這段不可預測的旅程，每個決定都很重要，每個秘密都會帶來後果。 Ardent Passions 的主要特點 一個身臨其境的故事，有有意義的選擇來探索截然不同的結果。以絢麗的高清呈現清晰、美麗的影像。加深體驗的音樂和音效。全動畫成人場景，帶有色情音效，可增強體驗。多種結局取決於角色選擇成為哪種類型的超級英雄。

data.short_description: 《熱情激情》是一部成人視覺小說，英雄曼在一次露營旅行中揭開了女友和她朋友的私刑秘密。隨著這些關係的命運受到威脅，遊戲的展開決定了這些義警是成為盟友還是敵人。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 荷蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista or Higher
  • 處理器: 2.0ghz Core 2 Duo
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • 處理器: Intel Only

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04 or Kernel 3.x+ distributions
  • 處理器: 2.0ghz Core 2 Duo
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES 2 required
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system

data.name: Ardent Passions
data.detailed_description:
Ardent Passions Story Overview
Big Chungus Productions invites you into an immersive narrative adult visual novel game where the line between heroism and villainy blurs. As Heroman, the world-renowned superhero, escape the hustle and bustle of city life to embark on a rustic camping trip with your new love interest and her seemingly innocuous best friends. As the tranquility of the wilderness is disrupted by a chilling revelation, face the unexpected challenges and decision-making that will shape the course of your relationships and destiny.

In the heart of the great outdoors, secrets come to light, shattering Heroman's perception of his companions as he unearths their clandestine vigilante activities. Throughout the game, experience a gripping narrative with meaningful choices that shape the outcome. Will you sway your love interest and her friends from their questionable path or confront them in a thrilling battle of ideals? It's not just about saving the world this time - it's about defining what it means to be a hero. Whether these vigilantes become allies or adversaries depends on you.

Embark on this unpredictable journey in Ardent Passions where every decision matters and every secret bears consequences.

Key features in Ardent Passions
An immersive story with meaningful choices to explore with very different outcomes.
Crisp, beautiful images rendered in glorious HD.
Music and sound effects that deepen the experience.
Fully animated adult scenes with erotic sound effects that enhance the experience.

Multiple endings depending on which type of superhero the character chooses to become.

data.short_description: Ardent Passions is an adult visual novel where Heroman uncovers his girlfriend and her friends' vigilante secrets on a camping trip. With the fate of these relationships at stake, the game unfolds through decisions that determine if these vigilantes become allies or enemies.
data.supported_languages: English, French, Italian, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Turkish
